character_designs.name_cn: 北境攻城兵种通用多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: Reusable Northern Beastfolk Alliance siege troop modeling board covering eight siege-role templates: breacher, shield-wall, wolf rider, tunneler, troll hauler, wall-climber, dream-flute ritual soldier, and redmane cavalry overseer.

body_and_face.species_lock: The board contains eight recognizable beastfolk siege templates. Each template has explicit species proportion, facial traits, body mass, role gear, and posture.
body_and_face.shared_costume_logic: No uniform cloth army costume. Equipment is a practical siege system of cracked hide, heavy fur edge, bone lamellar plates, horn guards, old wood frames, rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, blackstone snow dust, old iron fasteners, and role tools.
body_and_face.badge_policy: Existing Wanshou emblem language can only appear as tiny physical bonewood, rope, tool, or drum-edge material detail. It must not become a wall mark, shield emblem, new crest, logo, or banner.

constant_anchors: old iron nail and hoop fasteners
blackstone snow dust and frozen mud
ochre grass and wind-eroded brown palette
small restrained blue survival fire accent
tiny locked Wanshou bonewood material reference only as a physical object

state_designs.species_and_body: Blackfang lower-tier heavy infantry, upright beast-dominant body, 2.25-2.45m, 160-220kg, shoulders nearly twice human width, short broad tiger/boar muzzle, black outward tusks, deep eye sockets, ears pinned back, log-like forearms and palms.
state_designs.role_gear: Giant horn helmet, bone shard shoulder armor, hide chest guard, outer knee bone armor, bone-handled axe or battering hammer.
state_designs.readable_function: Breaches chevaux-de-frise and gate beams while advancing beside mammoth or rhino impact.

state_designs.species_and_body: Bovine lower-tier heavy soldier, minotaur-like, 2.05-2.3m, 180-260kg, complete bull head, short blunt horns, broad wet nose, thick neck, wide ribcage, low center of gravity, pillar legs and broad hooves.
state_designs.role_gear: Plain 1.4-1.7m bone-and-old-iron shield, long-handled hammer, yak-hide knee guards.
state_designs.readable_function: Protects shamans, siege timber, and shield-dragging laborers; must feel immovable rather than agile.

state_designs.species_and_body: Wolf-blood light cavalry, 1.85-2.05m, 80-115kg, upright wolf-muzzle body, narrow elastic shoulders, long wolf muzzle, upright ears, golden vertical pupils, canines, long lower legs, low wolf tail, grey-white mane along neck and shoulder blades.
state_designs.role_gear: Fitted leather armor, short bow, curved saber, wolf-tooth clasp, snow boot claw covers, frost wolf or snow-mane dire wolf mount.
state_designs.readable_function: Scouts around walls, kills messengers, and harasses at night with low crouched pack-hunter posture.

state_designs.species_and_body: Snowbadger engineer, 1.45-1.65m, 90-130kg, badger face, glossy black nose, small ears, thick chest and belly, wide pelvis, extremely thick forearms, claws longer than human fingers.
state_designs.role_gear: Bone shovel, blackstone wedges, under-ice breathing bladder, short hammer, hard-fur short cloak.
state_designs.readable_function: Digs tunnels, breaks granary foundations, and enters through drainage ditches; body should read as compressed heavy machinery.

state_designs.species_and_body: Troll strongman, 2.8-3.4m, 350-600kg, grey-blue thick skin, long arms past knees, huge hands, broad feet, old scars and lime-white stone streaks across back.
state_designs.role_gear: Coarse chains, timber-dragging hooks, ice-bridge wedges, giant stone bag.
state_designs.readable_function: Drags siege timber, ice bridges, and stones; slow but stable under arrow fire, visually part of the siege machinery.

state_designs.species_and_body: Eagle or crow light infantry, 1.75-1.95m, 55-80kg, light skeleton, narrow shoulders, short beak or bird-beak nose, glossy bird eyes, feather crest, forearm feathers, long clawed fingers.
state_designs.role_gear: Grappling hook, rope, short-wing gliding cloak, light short knife, message tube, small fire pot.
state_designs.readable_function: Climbs walls, cuts flags, opens inner gates, and throws small fire pots; light and fast, not a heavy flying monster.

state_designs.species_and_body: Shaman-and-guard pair. Shaman is 1.75-1.95m, 60-85kg, higher human proportion with deer ears, long neck, pale deer markings, fine antler branches and deer eyes. Guard is 1.9-2.1m, 90-120kg, more upright deer or elk-faced heavy guard with broader shoulders.
state_designs.role_gear: Bone flute, herb bag, ice-blue shoulder wrap, deer-pattern amulet, blood-salt pouch.
state_designs.readable_function: Calms giant beasts, times charges, and lowers panic; shaman reads slender and stable while guard protects.

state_designs.species_and_body: Red-maned lion-blood noble cavalry, 2.05-2.25m, 130-180kg, strong chest and back, narrow waist, red mane from temples to shoulder mantle edge, golden-brown eyes, short exposed canines.
state_designs.role_gear: Blood-red war flag, long saber, bone-gold chest armor, thick leather war skirt.
state_designs.readable_function: Shows Northern court order and noble authority; power comes from upright posture and broad shoulders, not monster exaggeration.

detail_panels: bone flute, herb bag, and blood-salt pouch
long saber and war-flag cloth fragment
rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, snow-mud wraps, old iron nails, and material swatches
negative_rules: all eight models sharing the same body with swapped weapons
Bai Yi or Qingming visual language
Luming noble shaman costume copied onto all roles
